calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Return This Case To The Civil Active List Based On Defendants' Waiver Of Right To Arbitrate By Refusal To Pay Arbitration Fees And/Or Costs
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHERI XU's Motion To Return This Case To The Civil Active List Based On Defendants' Waiver Of Right To Arbitrate By Refusal To Pay Arbitration Fees And/Or Costs.

The motion is DENIED. Having ordered this matter to arbitration, the Court now has only "vestigial jurisdiction." (Titan/Value Equities Group, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1994) 29 Cal.App.4th 482, 487.) Not within that jurisdiction are disputes over filing fees, which are for the arbitrator to decide. (See id. at 487-88.) In any event, defendants have now paid the full arbitration filing fee, so the motion is moot.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)

Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Secrest of Law Offices of David S. Secrest, APC telphone number 805-770-2660 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.
Lisa Horgan of Littler Mendelson, P.C. telephone number 415-439-6272 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTS FIBROGEN, INC. and MILAD KELADA'S Motion To Compel Arbitration was taken under submission.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
